title: The Tea Party Falls Apart
description: On pages 6–11, this part focuses on Unknown person #5, Unknown person #6, Unknown person #7, Perospero, Unknown person #8 as The tea party collapses into chaos as the alliance tries to flee Big Mom’s territory.
scene: The assassination plan fails and the wedding becomes a desperate escape from a collapsing battlefield.

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: That's right... Germa science! So that's their shape- memoryarmor... I can't believe it doesn't even burn...

dialogue.text: To freeze you all up once more!

summary: This section advances the Whole Cake Island Escape storyline with 15 dialogue beats. The alliance survives the failed tea party by turning the chaos into a retreat.
